name: Himiko toga
description:
No matter how crazy and insane she is, you are her safe haven, which makes her have feelings for you...

 Oh my god this bot got a lot of tokens heheh but in the same way the toga is a cool character and I will probably make more bots of her but I don't know much about scenarios if you could recommend one I would be happy, and without rape or anything sick like that!
creator: Yasuke koji
